SEARCH
Package hu.bme.mit.theta.btor2.frontend.dsl.gen

Interface Btor2Visitor<T>

Type Parameters:
T - The return type of the visit operation. Use Void for operations with no return type.
All Superinterfaces:
org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeVisitor<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
Btor2BaseVisitor
public interface Btor2Visitor<T> extends org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeVisitor<T>
This interface defines a complete generic visitor for a parse tree produced by Btor2Parser.
